headline: P&L exposure: ₹353.6 Cr direct revenue (engine estimate) + ₹250.7 Cr indirect (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.05-0.1x (engine estimate) possible if revenue at risk materializes; margin erosion of 246.0 bps (engine estimate); ₹604.3 Cr revenue at risk (from article + engine estimate).
Cost of capital likely to rise by 20-40 bps (engine estimate) due to weaker ESG signals and potential FII outflows, as flagged by BRSR and TCFD frameworks.
No supply chain transmission; the event is a direct market access and pricing shock, not a supplier disruption.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹353.6 Cr direct revenue (engine estimate) + ₹250.7 Cr indirect (engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: ₹353.6 Cr direct (engine estimate) + ₹250.7 Cr indirect (engine estimate)
